message:
Add message-based error classification for ambiguous HTTP status codes

For 400/422 responses, check message text for classification signals before
defaulting to InvalidRequestError. Maps "content filter"/"safety" to
ContentFilterError, "context length"/"too many tokens" to ContextLengthError,
"quota"/"billing" to QuotaExceededError, "not found"/"does not exist" to
NotFoundError. Unambiguous status codes (401, 429, etc.) are not affected.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
